queries.question: Show me information about the time period in which Hamlet was written
queries.sql: SELECT name, description FROM Epoch JOIN Play ON Epoch.id = Play.epoch_id WHERE title = "Hamlet";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?epoch a :Epoch .
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:hasEpoch ?epoch .
  ?epoch p:name ?name .
  ?epoch p:description ?description .
  ?play p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Hamlet")
}

queries.question: Show me information about the time period in which Hamlet was written and the society in which it was written.
queries.sql: SELECT Epoch.name, Epoch.description, Society.name, Society.culture FROM Epoch JOIN Play ON Epoch.id = Play.epoch_id JOIN Society ON Society.id = Play.Society_id WHERE title = "Hamlet";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description ?name2 ?culture WHERE {
  ?epoch a :Epoch .
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:hasEpoch ?epoch .
  ?society a :Society .
  ?play p:hasSociety ?society .
  ?epoch p:name ?name .
  ?epoch p:description ?description .
  ?society p:name ?name2 .
  ?society p:culture ?culture .
  ?play p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Hamlet")
}

queries.question: Which context has the most plays set in it, and how many?
queries.sql: SELECT Epoch.name, COUNT(Play.id) AS number_of_plays FROM Epoch JOIN Play ON Epoch.id = Play.epoch_id GROUP BY Epoch.id ORDER BY number_of_plays DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name (COUNT(?id_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?epoch a :Epoch .
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:hasEpoch ?epoch .
  ?epoch p:id ?id_g .
  ?epoch p:name ?name .
  ?play p:id ?id_a .
}
GROUP BY ?id_g ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?agg)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Which context has the most plays set in it, and how many?
queries.sql: SELECT Society.name, COUNT(Play.id) AS number_of_plays FROM Society JOIN Play ON Society.id = Play.Society_id GROUP BY Society.id ORDER BY number_of_plays DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name (COUNT(?id_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?society a :Society .
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:hasSociety ?society .
  ?society p:id ?id_g .
  ?society p:name ?name .
  ?play p:id ?id_a .
}
GROUP BY ?id_g ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?agg)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Which context has the most plays set in it, and how many?
queries.sql: SELECT Epoch.name, Society.name, COUNT(Play.id) AS number_of_plays FROM Epoch JOIN Play ON Epoch.id = Play.epoch_id JOIN Society ON Society.id = Play.Society_id  GROUP BY Epoch.id ORDER BY number_of_plays DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 (COUNT(?id_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?epoch a :Epoch .
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:hasEpoch ?epoch .
  ?society a :Society .
  ?play p:hasSociety ?society .
  ?epoch p:id ?id_g .
  ?epoch p:name ?name .
  ?society p:name ?name2 .
  ?play p:id ?id_a .
}
GROUP BY ?id_g ?name ?name2
ORDER BY DESC(?agg)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: What was society like at the time Hamlet was written
queries.sql: SELECT name, culture FROM Society JOIN Play ON Society.id = Play.Society_id WHERE title = "Hamlet";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?culture WHERE {
  ?society a :Society .
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:hasSociety ?society .
  ?society p:name ?name .
  ?society p:culture ?culture .
  ?play p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Hamlet")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me information about the context in which Hamlet was written.
Which context has the most plays set in it, and how many?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?name ?name2 (COUNT(?id_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?epoch a :Epoch .
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:hasEpoch ?epoch .
  ?society a :Society .
  ?play p:hasSociety ?society .
  ?epoch p:id ?id_g .
  ?epoch p:name ?name .
  ?society p:name ?name2 .
  ?play p:id ?id_a .
}
GROUP BY ?id_g ?name ?name2
ORDER BY DESC(?agg)
LIMIT 1 }
  component: { SELECT ?name (COUNT(?id_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?epoch a :Epoch .
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:hasEpoch ?epoch .
  ?epoch p:id ?id_g .
  ?epoch p:name ?name .
  ?play p:id ?id_a .
}
GROUP BY ?id_g ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?agg)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name (COUNT(?id_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?society a :Society .
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:hasSociety ?society .
  ?society p:id ?id_g .
  ?society p:name ?name .
  ?play p:id ?id_a .
}
GROUP BY ?id_g ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?agg)
LIMIT 1 }
}
